zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Mainwaring於1130年出生在英國爾瓦明加姆時，他的父親William de Mainwaring20歲，母親Ann Thomas30歲。他於大約1154年與Ellen de Warmingham在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1195年在英國斯塔福爾利可享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Mainwaring于1130年出生在英国爾瓦明加姆时，他的父亲William de Mainwaring20岁，母亲Ann Thomas30岁。他于大约1154年与Ellen de Warmingham在英国英格兰斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1195年在英国斯塔福爾利可享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Mainwaring was born in 1130, in Warmingham, Cheshire, England, his father, William de Mainwaring, was 20 and his mother, Ann Thomas, was 30. He married Ellen de Warmingham about 1154, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1195, in Leek, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Mainwaring est né en 1130, à Warmingham, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Mainwaring, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Ann Thomas, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Ellen de Warmingham environ 1154, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1195, à Leek, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Mainwaring 1130 in Warmingham, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Mainwaring 20 und seine Mutter Ann Thomas 30. Er hat um 1154 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Ellen de Warmingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1195 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Leek, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Mainwaring è nato il nel 1130 nel Warmingham, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, William de Mainwaring, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Ann Thomas, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Ellen de Warmingham circa 1154, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1195, nel Leek, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger de Mainwaringが1130年にイギリスチェシュアイアワーミンガムで生まれた時，父William de Mainwaringは20歳，母Ann Thomasは30歳であった。約1154年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアでEllen de Warminghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1195年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアリークで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Mainwaring(이)가 1130년 영국 체실르 워밍함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Mainwaring(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Thomas(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1154년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Ellen de Warmingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1195년 영국 스태퍼드실르 리크에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Mainwaring nasceu em 1130, em Warmingham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Mainwaring, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Ann Thomas, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen de Warmingham aproximadamente 1154, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1195, em Leek, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Mainwaring родился в 1130 г. в местности вармингхам, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Mainwaring было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Thomas, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen de Warmingham около 1154 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1195 г. в местности лик, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger de Mainwaring nació en 1130, en Warmingham, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Mainwaring, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Ann Thomas, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Ellen de Warmingham aproximadamente 1154, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1195, en Leek, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
